question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులోకి అనువదించండి:
1966 మరియు 1970 మధ్య పెర్ల్ మరియు ఫింగర్ మిల్లెట్ల సగటు దిగుబడులు మరియు మొత్తం ఉత్పత్తికి రాష్ట్ర వారీగా సారాంశాన్ని అందించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, AVG(T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T1.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state_name, 
    AVG(fm.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_pearl_millet_yield, 
    AVG(fm.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_finger_millet_yield, 
    SUM(fm.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS total_pearl_millet_production, 
    SUM(fm.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS total_finger_millet_production
FROM 
    fact_millets fm
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fm.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON fm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    dy.year BETWEEN 1966 AND 1970
GROUP BY 
    dg.state_name
ORDER BY 
    dg.state_name;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.state_name, 
    AVG(fm.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_pearl_millet_yield, 
    AVG(fm.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS avg_finger_millet_yield, 
    SUM(fm.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS total_pearl_millet_production, 
    SUM(fm.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS total_finger_millet_production
FROM 
    fact_millets fm
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fm.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON fm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    dy.year BETWEEN 1966 AND 1970
GROUP BY 
    dg.state_name
ORDER BY 
    dg.state_name;
